completion_summary: Aligned equilibrium-characterization maturity with actual runtime routes: declared the lite reaction network and reactor providers plus UV/Vis provider, retained pH and synthetic instrument providers, and removed the unreachable reference-only fixed-T,P Gibbs solver from task dependencies without changing World Law, observations, scoring, actions, or benchmark values. Tests: targeted maturity/reachability/audit/benchmark/golden/design/serious suite 48 passed; full pytest 886 passed, 11 skipped; Ruff and mypy passed; tasks readiness 6/6 validated; maturity audit declaration gaps 0. Reference evidence: ChemWorld v0.3 runtime service/kernel/model reachability registries and fixed report JSON; fixed-T,P Gibbs provider remains catalogued as reference-only. Limitation: release-gate documentation phase requires mkdocs, unavailable in the environment. Final implementation commit: 037a3d5.
notes: WF-00 integration authority owns this contract alignment. No task action, World Law, observation/scoring behavior, benchmark values, golden actions, runtime route, or active WF-30 paths change; only contract hash bindings and dependency evidence may update.
scope: WF-00.3 align equilibrium-characterization task maturity with actual allowed operation and instrument routes, removing unreachable reference-only declarations and preserving explicit role diagnostics without changing runtime behavior
